_doc: Odd-overlap lemma hunt (paper #6 session, 2026-07-10/11). All values exact. PROVEN = hand proof in the session report; MACHINE = exhaustive exact computation (stdlib B&B, scripts in this dir, seconds to reproduce); witnesses re-verified against the exact conflict predicate.

structure_lemma.t1: 16 color classes (F_2^R/1, |R|=5), conflict iff same color, 16 x K44, 256 edges [PROVEN+MACHINE]
structure_lemma.t3: both cells biject to folded 7-cube F_2^7/1; conflict iff folded distance <= 1; 512 edges [PROVEN+MACHINE]

pair_caps.t3_rigidity_proof: Menger + folded-7-cube connectivity 7 (machine-verified by max-flow; also Brouwer-Mesner DRG connectivity = valency); witness (1,56)

W7.status: MACHINE (16 delta-classes, each exact MIS 4; partition bound) + tight

W8.status: PROVEN (covering: each cell in 4 of the 8 W7s => 4N <= 8*64) + tight

localization.full_cell_corollary: n_A = 64 => config <= 64 + W8(H_A) = 192; so any config >= 193 has all n_A <= 63 [PROVEN]

even_side.classification: pairwise-even 4-set family: span components are d_2m (pair-aligned), e7 (Fano complements, 7 pts), e8 (extended Hamming wt-4 words, 8 pts) [PROVEN, self-contained]

kappa_e7_family.status: 64 MACHINE (subsumed by W7); <=224 PROVEN by kappa-averaging

kappa_e8_family.status: PROVEN <=128 via W8 covering; =128 by complementary pair; independent MACHINE confirmation via 8 delta-classes x 112-vertex exact MIS = 16 each

even_side.even_closure: any independent config with pairwise-even occupied cells <= 288; e7-branch <= 128, e8-branch <= 192; 288 only via pair-aligned (slice) [PROVEN given the slice-closure theorem]
even_side.corollary: any >= 289 config contains an occupied odd pair; odd-overlap lemma <=> alpha(U12) = 288 [PROVEN]
even_side.roadmap_correction: 'outside every slice => odd pair' as stated in K2_novelty.json consequences is FALSE at the cell level (e7/e8 families are counterexamples); Even Closure repairs the decomposition

triple_orbit_table.complete_invariant: Venn signature (|ABC|,|AB-C|,|AC-B|,|BC-A|) canonical over role permutations

all_overlapping_union_ge_8.status: MACHINE exact (upper 80 delta split + verified 80 witness) - point-core sunflower

triple_orbit_table.moral: pairwise overlap types do NOT determine the cap; Venn structure does. Sunflowers with disjoint petals are the only 3-cell structures beating 64 (they reach 80).
triple_orbit_table.moral_correction_2026_07_11: Pre-DOI audit correction (the 'moral' above is preserved verbatim as the session record, but its second sentence overclaims): the OPEN Venn (1,0,0,1) class (ts (1,1,2), union 9) has a verified 78-line witness, so it ALSO beats 64 and is not a sunflower. Correct statement: three classes beat 64 -- the two disjoint-petal sunflowers (exactly 80) and Venn (1,0,0,1) (cap in [78,80]).

lp_barrier.statement: no family of valid occupancy inequalities with <= 109 positive-support cells each can prove alpha <= 288: uniform point n_A = 64/k is feasible, LP >= 31680/k >= 290.6
lp_barrier.consequence: kappa/triples/localization/e8/slice/ladder cuts (support <= 35) give LP >= 905; a cut-based proof needs >= 110-cell inequalities

star_reduction.statement: every line lies in exactly 4 coordinate stars; star_x world == U11 world (10560 lines, 165 cells, no free cell pairs); hence alpha(U12) <= 3 * alpha(U11)
star_reduction.witness_saturation: the 288 slice witness meets every star in exactly 96 (machine-verified uniform)
star_reduction.jewel_reduction: alpha(U11) <= 96 => alpha(U12) = 288 (odd lemma closed). alpha(U11) >= 96 already (star of witness). Pigeonhole: any 289-config contains a >= 97-line U11 config.
star_reduction.star_cuts_pass_barrier: the 12 star cuts have 165-cell support (>= 110) and with cap 96 their covering LP gives exactly 288

open: alpha(U11) <= 96 (equivalently: the last stretch of the odd lemma). Attack: KaMIS lower hunt for 97 + CP-SAT ladder on U11 with this session's cut library (kappa, 57-rigidity, W6/W7/W8 localization, sunflower-80, e7-64/e8-128).
